no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/...` still fails outside the bead scope. The failures are in existing agent tests that expect deprecated config values (`gpt-4o`, `turbo`) and in `TestCancelLatency_UnderSLA`, which times out after 10m with the worker stuck in cancellation/probe loops. The new missing-skill diagnostic tests pass, and `lefthook run pre-commit` passes, but the acceptance-required full suite is not green in this worktree without unrelated fixes.
